zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Pilkington Snr於從大約1363年到1364年出生在英國藍卡爾皮爾金頓時，他的父親Roger de Pilkington III39歲，母親Ann Savage37歲。他和Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1421年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Pilkington Snr于从大约1363年到1364年出生在英国藍卡爾皮爾金頓时，他的父亲Roger de Pilkington III39岁，母亲Ann Savage37岁。他和Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1421年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Pilkington Snr was born from about 1363 to 1364, in Pilkington, Lancashire, England, his father, Roger de Pilkington III, was 39 and his mother, Ann Savage, was 37. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun. He registered for military service in 1415. He died in 1421, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Pilkington Snr est né du environ 1363 au 1364, à Pilkington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Pilkington III, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ann Savage, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé en 1421, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Pilkington Snr von um 1363 bis 1364 in Pilkington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Pilkington III 39 und seine Mutter Ann Savage 37. Er hatte mit Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1421 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Pilkington Snr è nato il da circa 1363 a 1364 nel Pilkington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Pilkington III, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Ann Savage, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì nel 1421, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Pilkington Snrがから約1363年まで1364年にイギリスランカシュアイアピルキントンで生まれた時，父Roger de Pilkington IIIは39歳，母Ann Savageは37歳であった。彼はMargaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdunとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1421年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Pilkington Snr(이)가 대략 1363년 부터 1364년 까지 영국 랭카실르 피킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Pilkington III(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Savage(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1421년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Atherton, Lancashire, England, United Ki: Atherton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Pilkington Snr nasceu de aproximadamente 1363 a 1364, em Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Pilkington III, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ann Savage, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 1421, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Pilkington Snr родился с около 1363 по 1364 в местности пилкингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Pilkington III было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Savage, 37. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1421 г. в его родном городе.

sm.from about 1363 to 1364–1421: mai le e tusa o le 1363 e o'o I le 1364–1421
sm.from about 1363 to 1364: mai le e tusa o le 1363 e o'o I le 1364

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Pilkington Snr nació desde aproximadamente 1363 hasta 1364, en Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Pilkington III, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ann Savage, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió en 1421, en su pueblo.
